meaning: adj.[化]癸二酸的 由癸二酸衍生的
examples: The effects of hexanedioic acid, sebacic acid and oxalic acid on floatation performance of feldspar and quartz were investigated.
OBJECTIVE To study the feasible synthesis method of poly-sebacic anhydride.
Decanediamide was synthesized using sebacic acid and urea as starting materials.
